name: Geoff Muldaur
abstract: Geoff Muldaur (born August 12, 1943) is an American singer, guitarist and composer, who was a founding member of the Jim Kweskin Jug Band and a member of Paul Butterfield's Better Days.

concerts.label: Music + Revolution: Greenwich Village in the 1960s

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: this wasn’t the Paul Butterfield Blues band, this was a new thing that he wanted to put together with Geoff Muldaur. It ended up being called Better Days and we did two albums
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
